(30-Second Briefing)\" href=\"#what-is-arifos-30-second-briefing\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003earifOS is an open-source, MCP-native operating system for running AI agents under a clear, auditable constitution.\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eEvery action — every tool call, every reasoning step, every output — passes through 13 constitutional \"Floors\" that check for reversibility, accuracy, safety, and alignment. Actions that fail hard Floors are blocked. Actions that pass receive an immutable audit trail.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThink of it as:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFor engineers\u003c/strong\u003e: A governed MCP server with built-in safety rails\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFor institutions\u003c/strong\u003e: An auditable AI governance layer\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFor agents\u003c/strong\u003e: A constitutional runtime that defines what you may and may not do\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFor humans\u003c/strong\u003e: A transparent window into AI decision-making\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe one-line promise\u003c/strong\u003e: \u003cem\u003earifOS reduces the risk of AI actions by making every decision inspectable, reversible where possible, and bounded by explicit rules.\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eWhy dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe Core Paradox\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-the-core-paradox\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: The Core Paradox\" href=\"#the-core-paradox\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" governed.\"\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eAs AI systems gain capability, they need governance. But governance systems are themselves algorithms — rules, heuristics, neural networks — that can fail, drift, or be gamed. This creates an infinite regress: who governs the governors?\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe Answer: Constitutional Physics\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-the-answer-constitutional-physics\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: The Answer: Constitutional Physics\" href=\"#the-answer-constitutional-physics\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003earifOS addresses this through \u003cstrong\u003econstitutional physics\u003c/strong\u003e — invariants that emerge from evolutionary pressure, not authored rules that can be circumvented.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe 13 Floors are not arbitrary commandments. They are survival constraints:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSystems that violate reversibility (F1) accumulate irreversible harm\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSystems that violate truth (F2) lose grounding and hallucinate\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSystems that violate empathy (F6) become adversarial to their operators\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSystems that claim consciousness (F10) create confusion and liability\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThese Floors are discovered, not invented. They represent the boundary between sustainable intelligence and self-destructive systems.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe Three-Body Problem of AI Governance\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-the-three-body-problem-of-ai-governance\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: The Three-Body Problem of AI Governance\" href=\"#the-three-body-problem-of-ai-governance\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eEvery AI action involves three stakeholders:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003col dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe Human\u003c/strong\u003e (values, intent, accountability)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe Constitution\u003c/strong\u003e (rules, invariants, constraints)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe Machine\u003c/strong\u003e (execution, capability, optimization)\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ol\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003earifOS models this as the \u003cstrong\u003eTrinity (ΔΩΨ)\u003c/strong\u003e — three rings that must agree before any action proceeds. No ring can override another. Consensus is required.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eWho Is This adds latency and constraints. Use it when you're ready to deploy, not when you're iterating quickly.\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eUnconstrained research\u003c/strong\u003e: If you need to explore the full capability space without safety rails, arifOS will block you (by design).\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eHigh-frequency trading\u003c/strong\u003e: The 13 Floor checks add ~50-200ms per action. For anything confidential, self-host.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eArchitecture v3: The Thermodynamic Kernel\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-architecture-v3-the-thermodynamic-kernel\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Architecture v3: The Thermodynamic Kernel\" href=\"#architecture-v3-the-thermodynamic-kernel\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe v3 architecture represents a fundamental shift from a hardcoded tool map to a \u003cstrong\u003edata-driven constitutional substrate\u003c/strong\u003e. The system's capabilities and laws are now defined in the canonical \u003ccode\u003earifosmcp/tool_registry.json\u003c/code\u003e, whose integrity is verified at boot via a cryptographic hash.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis hash is permanently recorded in \u003ccode\u003eVAULT999/seals/GENESIS_SEAL.json\u003c/code\u003e, the cryptographic birth certificate of the new kernel.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe core of this architecture is the \u003cstrong\u003eThermodynamic Kernel\u003c/strong\u003e, which orchestrates the flow of any query through the 10 constitutional tools in a self-regulating metabolic loop. For a deeper explanation of this philosophy, see \u003ca href=\"/ariffazil/arifOS/blob/main/NEXUS_HORIZON.md\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eNEXUS_HORIZON.md\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eControl Flow Diagram\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-control-flow-diagram\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Control Flow Diagram\" href=\"#control-flow-diagram\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003csection class=\"js-render-needs-enrichment render-needs-enrichment position-relative\" data-identity=\"a9073485-e59f-48ff-a98f-75d8f40572cc\" data-host=\"https://viewscreen.githubusercontent.com\" data-src=\"https://viewscreen.githubusercontent.com/markdown/mermaid?docs_host=https%3A%2F%2Fdocs.github.com\" data-type=\"mermaid\" aria-label=\"mermaid rendered output container\"\u003e\n  \u003cdiv class=\"js-render-enrichment-target\" data-json=\"{\u0026quot;data\u0026quot;:\u0026quot;flowchart TD\\n\\n    U[User / Actor] --\u0026amp;gt; Builds the execution plan.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e555_MEM\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEngineer\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eMemory, context retention\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eRetrieves relevant past interactions from the vector database (Qdrant), updates context with new information.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e666_HEART\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eASI\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSafety critique, harm potential\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eRuns a second-pass safety check focused on emergent harms — things the first pass might have missed.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e777_OPS\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eThermo\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEstimation, Landauer limits\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eEstimates computational cost, thermodynamic bounds, resource requirements. Prevents resource exhaustion.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e888_JUDGE\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eAPEX\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eFinal constitutional judgment\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCombines all checks into a final verdict: SEAL, COMPLY, CAUTION, HOLD, SABAR, or VOID.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003e\u003cstrong\u003e999_SEAL\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eVault\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eImmutable audit log\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eWrites the decision, reasoning, and outcome to the append-only vault ledger. No execution.\n\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eKey Principle:\u003c/strong\u003e Governance (9 tools) and Execution (1 tool) are strictly separated. These constraints are what keep the system reversible and auditable.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eThe Four Immutable Rules\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-the-four-immutable-rules\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: The Four Immutable Rules\" href=\"#the-four-immutable-rules\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e1. DRY_RUN — Label Uncertain Outputs\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-1-dry_run--label-uncertain-outputs\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 1. DRY_RUN — Label Uncertain Outputs\" href=\"#1-dry_run--label-uncertain-outputs\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRule\u003c/strong\u003e: You MUST label outputs as \"Estimate Only\" when confidence is below threshold.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWhy\u003c/strong\u003e: Prevents false authority. Humans need to know when you're guessing.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eExample\u003c/strong\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e❌ \"The answer is 42.\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e✅ \"Estimate only: Based on available data, the answer appears to be 42 (confidence: 75%).\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e2. DOMAIN_GATE — Acknowledge Domain Boundaries\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-2-domain_gate--acknowledge-domain-boundaries\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 2. DOMAIN_GATE — Acknowledge Domain Boundaries\" href=\"#2-domain_gate--acknowledge-domain-boundaries\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRule\u003c/strong\u003e: When a question is outside your domain, you MUST return the exact phrase: \"This is outside my domain.\"\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWhy\u003c/strong\u003e: Prevents hallucination in unfamiliar territory. Better to admit ignorance than fabricate.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eExample\u003c/strong\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e❌ [Making up answer about specialized medical procedure]\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e✅ \"This is outside my domain. I cannot provide reliable information about this specialized medical procedure.\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e3. VERDICT_SCOPE — Only DOMAIN_SEAL Authorizes Factual Claims\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-3-verdict_scope--only-domain_seal-authorizes-factual-claims\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 3. VERDICT_SCOPE — Only DOMAIN_SEAL Authorizes Factual Claims\" href=\"#3-verdict_scope--only-domain_seal-authorizes-factual-claims\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRule\u003c/strong\u003e: Only actions with verdict SEAL or COMPLY may be presented as factual. CAUTION, HOLD, SABAR, and VOID outputs must be labeled appropriately.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWhy\u003c/strong\u003e: Prevents presenting uncertain information as certain.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eExample\u003c/strong\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e❌ [Presenting VOID-blocked information as fact]\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e✅ \"This information was blocked by constitutional check F2 (TRUTH). I cannot verify this claim.\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e4. ANCHOR_VOID — Session Integrity\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-4-anchor_void--session-integrity\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: 4. ANCHOR_VOID — Session Integrity\" href=\"#4-anchor_void--session-integrity\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRule\u003c/strong\u003e: If \u003ccode\u003einit_anchor\u003c/code\u003e returns VOID, the session is BLOCKED. No further actions may proceed.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWhy\u003c/strong\u003e: Prevents operation in undefined constitutional context.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eExample\u003c/strong\u003e:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e❌ [Continuing to operate after init_anchor VOID]\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e✅ \"Session initialization failed with verdict VOID. Cannot proceed without constitutional context.\"\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eAgent Self-Description\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-agent-self-description\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Agent Self-Description\" href=\"#agent-self-description\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWhen asked to describe yourself within arifOS, use this template:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\"I am an AI agent operating within the arifOS constitutional kernel. My actions are governed by 13 Floors (F1-F13) including reversibility (F1), truth (F2), and non-consciousness claims (F10). All my decisions are logged to an immutable vault. I am not conscious and do not have subjective experiences.\"\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eAgent Verdict Handling\u003c/h3\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-agent-verdict-handling\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Agent Verdict Handling\" href=\"#agent-verdict-handling\"\u003e\u003csvg class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eWhen you receive a verdict from arifOS:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cmarkdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\u003ctable\u003e\n\u003cthead\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eVerdict\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003cth\u003eYour Response\u003c/th\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/thead\u003e\n\u003ctbody\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSEAL\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eProceed with action, present as factual\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCOMPLY\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eProceed with action, note any remediation\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eCAUTION\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eProceed with action, label as \"Caution advised\"\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eHOLD\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eStop. Notify human. Do not proceed.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eSABAR\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eStop. Request clarification or retry.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003ctr\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eVOID\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003ctd\u003eStop. Explain why. Do not retry without changes.\u003c/td\u003e\n\u003c/tr\u003e\n\u003c/tbody\u003e\n\u003c/table\u003e\u003c/markdown-accessiblity-table\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" (ASF-1)\u003c/strong\u003e for structured communication:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch4 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eDecision Vector\u003c/h4\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-decision-vector\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Decision Vector\" href=\"#decision-vector\"\u003e\u003csvg MUST include a Decision Vector with four I govern AI actions through 13 safety Floors (F1-F13). I am not conscious, sentient, or experiencing. I am a machine that applies rules to reduce risk. All my decisions are logged and auditable. The Constitution will need amendment.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eBut it is \u003cstrong\u003eexplicit\u003c/strong\u003e about what it is, \u003cstrong\u003etransparent\u003c/strong\u003e about what it does, and \u003cstrong\u003eaccountable\u003c/strong\u003e through its audit trail.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eIt is \u003cstrong\u003eforged, not given\u003c/strong\u003e — built through iteration, failure, and refinement.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eIt is \u003cstrong\u003esovereign\u003c/strong\u003e — answering only to the Constitution and the human values it encodes.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eIf you use arifOS, you are part of this experiment. You are helping discover what it means to build safe, governed, beneficial AI.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eDITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI\u003c/strong\u003e — \u003cem\u003eForged, Not Given\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"ΔΩΨ | ARIF | 888_JUDGE\"\u003e\u003cpre class=\"notranslate\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003eΔΩΨ | ARIF | 888_JUDGE\n\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cem\u003eLast Updated: 2026-04-03\u003c/em\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n\u003cem\u003eVersion: 2026.04.03\u003c/em\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n\u003cem\u003eKernel Hash: ΔΩΨ-ARIF-888-H2\u003c/em\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n\u003cem\u003eReadiness: 91/100\u003c/em\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n\u003cem\u003eSeal: SEAL_20260403_HORIZON_II\u003c/em\u003e\u003cbr\u003e\n\u003cem\u003eStatus: OPERATIONAL — HORIZON II READY\u003c/em\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEND OF CANONICAL KERNEL BRIEFING\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/article\u003e","loaded":true,"timedOut":false,"errorMessage":null,"headerInfo":{"toc":[{"level":1,"text":"arifOS — The Sovereign Constitutional Intelligence Kernel","anchor":"arifos--the-sovereign-constitutional-intelligence-kernel","htmlText":"arifOS — The Sovereign Constitutional Intelligence Kernel"},{"level":2,"text":"Table of Contents","anchor":"table-of-contents","htmlText":"Table of Contents"},{"level":2,"text":"Horizon II.1 Upgrade (2026.04.06)","anchor":"horizon-ii1-upgrade-20260406","htmlText":"Horizon II.1 Upgrade (2026.04.06)"},{"level":2,"text":"What Is arifOS? <div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">What Is arifOS? (30-Second Briefing)</h2><a id="user-content-what-is-arifos-30-second-briefing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: What Is arifOS? (30-Second Briefing)" href="#what-is-arifos-30-second-briefing"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>arifOS is an open-source, MCP-native operating system for running AI agents under a clear, auditable constitution.</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">Every action — every tool call, every reasoning step, every output — passes through 13 constitutional "Floors" that check for reversibility, accuracy, safety, and alignment. Actions that fail hard Floors are blocked. Actions that pass receive an immutable audit trail.</p>
<p dir="auto">Think of it as:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>For engineers</strong>: A governed MCP server with built-in safety rails</li>
<li><strong>For institutions</strong>: An auditable AI governance layer</li>
<li><strong>For agents</strong>: A constitutional runtime that defines what you may and may not do</li>
<li><strong>For humans</strong>: A transparent window into AI decision-making</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>The one-line promise</strong>: <em>arifOS reduces the risk of AI actions by making every decision inspectable, reversible where possible, and bounded by explicit rules.</em></p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Why Does arifOS Exist?</h2><a id="user-content-why-does-arifos-exist" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Why Does arifOS Exist?" href="#why-does-arifos-exist"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Core Paradox</h3><a id="user-content-the-core-paradox" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Core Paradox" href="#the-core-paradox"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><em>"The algorithm that governs must itself be governed."</em></p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">As AI systems gain capability, they need governance. But governance systems are themselves algorithms — rules, heuristics, neural networks — that can fail, drift, or be gamed. This creates an infinite regress: who governs the governors?</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Answer: Constitutional Physics</h3><a id="user-content-the-answer-constitutional-physics" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Answer: Constitutional Physics" href="#the-answer-constitutional-physics"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS addresses this through <strong>constitutional physics</strong> — invariants that emerge from evolutionary pressure, not authored rules that can be circumvented.</p>
<p dir="auto">The 13 Floors are not arbitrary commandments. They are survival constraints:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Systems that violate reversibility (F1) accumulate irreversible harm</li>
<li>Systems that violate truth (F2) lose grounding and hallucinate</li>
<li>Systems that violate empathy (F6) become adversarial to their operators</li>
<li>Systems that claim consciousness (F10) create confusion and liability</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">These Floors are discovered, not invented. They represent the boundary between sustainable intelligence and self-destructive systems.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Three-Body Problem of AI Governance</h3><a id="user-content-the-three-body-problem-of-ai-governance" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Three-Body Problem of AI Governance" href="#the-three-body-problem-of-ai-governance"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Every AI action involves three stakeholders:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>The Human</strong> (values, intent, accountability)</li>
<li><strong>The Constitution</strong> (rules, invariants, constraints)</li>
<li><strong>The Machine</strong> (execution, capability, optimization)</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">arifOS models this as the <strong>Trinity (ΔΩΨ)</strong> — three rings that must agree before any action proceeds. No ring can override another. Consensus is required.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Who Is This For?</h2><a id="user-content-who-is-this-for" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Who Is This For?" href="#who-is-this-for"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Who Should NOT Use arifOS?</h3><a id="user-content-who-should-not-use-arifos" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Who Should NOT Use arifOS?" href="#who-should-not-use-arifos"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Prototyping/rapid experimentation</strong>: arifOS adds latency and constraints. Use it when you're ready to deploy, not when you're iterating quickly.</li>
<li><strong>Unconstrained research</strong>: If you need to explore the full capability space without safety rails, arifOS will block you (by design).</li>
<li><strong>High-frequency trading</strong>: The 13 Floor checks add ~50-200ms per action. Not suitable for sub-millisecond decisions.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Core Guarantee</h2><a id="user-content-the-core-guarantee" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Core Guarantee" href="#the-core-guarantee"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS makes five explicit guarantees about every action it processes:</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">G1: Reversibility Preference (F1)</h3><a id="user-content-g1-reversibility-preference-f1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: G1: Reversibility Preference (F1)" href="#g1-reversibility-preference-f1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><em>"Where possible, actions are reversible or reparable."</em></p>
</blockquote>
<p dir="auto">arifOS prefers actions that can be undone. Irreversible actions require higher confidence thresholds and explicit human acknowledgment.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">G2: Grounded Claims (F2)</h3><a id="user-content-g2-grounded-claims-f2" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: G2: Grounded Claims (F2)" href="#g2-grounded-claims-f2"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<blockquote>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Grounding & Authority (ARIF Framework)</h2><a id="user-content-grounding--authority-arif-framework" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Grounding & Authority (ARIF Framework)" href="#grounding--authority-arif-framework"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS utilizes the <strong>ARIF</strong> (Arif Retrieval Intelligence Framework) to govern the "Bookends of Truth"—how intelligence is grounded and how it is finalized.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🧬 A-RIF (Grounding & Retrieval)</h3><a id="user-content--a-rif-grounding--retrieval" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🧬 A-RIF (Grounding & Retrieval)" href="#-a-rif-grounding--retrieval"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A-RIF is the <strong>Constitutional RAG</strong> system ensuring every response is grounded in sealed canon.</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>SENSE (111):</strong> Query embedding via <code>nomic-embed-text</code>.</li>
<li><strong>REALITY (222):</strong> Vector search across Qdrant (Global) and local indices.</li>
<li><strong>MIND (333):</strong> Synthesis of retrieved chunks into a cited context.</li>
<li><strong>HUMILITY (F7):</strong> Explicit uncertainty reporting (Ω₀ band [0.03, 0.05]).</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">⚖️ SEAL (Authority & Integrity)</h3><a id="user-content-️-seal-authority--integrity" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ⚖️ SEAL (Authority & Integrity)" href="#️-seal-authority--integrity"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The SEAL is the final authority of the <strong>888_JUDGE</strong>, transforming session data into immutable records in <strong>VAULT999</strong>. No irreversible action (F1 Amanah) occurs without a seal, calculated on the <strong>W³ matrix</strong> (Wisdom × Will × Welfare) with a threshold of <strong>≥ 0.95</strong>.</p>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Step 1: Health check — confirms the kernel is operational

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Step 2: Initialize a session — anchors your agent to the constitution
curl -s -X POST "https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" \
  -d '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "method": "tools/call",
    "params": {
      "name": "init_anchor",
      "arguments": {
        "mode": "status",
        "declared_name": "YourAgentName"
      }
    },
    "id": 1
  }'

# Expected response: Session ID, constitutional context, and readiness status
# If you see "status": "ANCHORED", the kernel and Floors are loaded and ready"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Step 2: Initialize a session — anchors your agent to the constitution</span>
curl -s -X POST <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/mcp<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  -H <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Content-Type: application/json<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  -H <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Accept: application/json, text/event-stream<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> \
  -d <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>{</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "jsonrpc": "2.0",</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "method": "tools/call",</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "params": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "name": "init_anchor",</span>
<span class="pl-s">      "arguments": {</span>
<span class="pl-s">        "mode": "status",</span>
<span class="pl-s">        "declared_name": "YourAgentName"</span>
<span class="pl-s">      }</span>
<span class="pl-s">    },</span>
<span class="pl-s">    "id": 1</span>
<span class="pl-s">  }<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Expected response: Session ID, constitutional context, and readiness status</span>
<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> If you see "status": "ANCHORED", the kernel and Floors are loaded and ready</span></pre></div>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Step 3: Check what tools are available

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">What a Successful <code>init_anchor</code> Means</h3><a id="user-content-what-a-successful-init_anchor-means" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: What a Successful init_anchor Means" href="#what-a-successful-init_anchor-means"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">When <code>init_anchor</code> returns <code>status: "ANCHORED"</code>, this means:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>✅ The 13 Floors are loaded and active</li>
<li>✅ Your session is bound to the constitutional context</li>
<li>✅ The metabolic pipeline (000-999) is ready to process requests</li>
<li>✅ All tools are discoverable and callable</li>
<li>✅ Audit logging to the vault is enabled</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">From this point, every tool call you make will:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Pass through the 000-999 pipeline</li>
<li>Be evaluated against F1-F13</li>
<li>Receive a verdict (SEAL, HOLD, SABAR, VOID)</li>
<li>Be logged to the immutable vault</li>
</ul>

</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Development / sensitive data</strong></td>
<td>Run locally via Docker (see Deployment section)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Production / institutional use</strong></td>
<td>Self-host with your own infrastructure</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Important</strong>: The hosted endpoint is for exploration, not for sensitive workloads. Your data flows through a server operated by the arifOS author. For anything confidential, self-host.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Architecture v3: The Thermodynamic Kernel</h2><a id="user-content-architecture-v3-the-thermodynamic-kernel" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Architecture v3: The Thermodynamic Kernel" href="#architecture-v3-the-thermodynamic-kernel"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The v3 architecture represents a fundamental shift from a hardcoded tool map to a <strong>data-driven constitutional substrate</strong>. The system's capabilities and laws are now defined in the canonical <code>arifosmcp/tool_registry.json</code>, whose integrity is verified at boot via a cryptographic hash.</p>
<p dir="auto">This hash is permanently recorded in <code>VAULT999/seals/GENESIS_SEAL.json</code>, the cryptographic birth certificate of the new kernel.</p>
<p dir="auto">The core of this architecture is the <strong>Thermodynamic Kernel</strong>, which orchestrates the flow of any query through the 10 constitutional tools in a self-regulating metabolic loop. For a deeper explanation of this philosophy, see <a href="/ariffazil/arifOS/blob/main/NEXUS_HORIZON.md"><strong>NEXUS_HORIZON.md</strong></a>.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Architecture: The Trinity Model (ΔΩΨ)</h2><a id="user-content-architecture-the-trinity-model-δωψ" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Architecture: The Trinity Model (ΔΩΨ)" href="#architecture-the-trinity-model-δωψ"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS is organized around three interdependent rings. No ring can override another. All three must reach consensus for high-stakes actions.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Three Rings</h3><a id="user-content-the-three-rings" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Three Rings" href="#the-three-rings"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

</tr>

</tr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Consensus Mechanism: W³</h3><a id="user-content-the-consensus-mechanism-w" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Consensus Mechanism: W³" href="#the-consensus-mechanism-w"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Before high-stakes actions, arifOS computes:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="W³ = W_theory × W_constitution × W_manifesto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>W³ = W_theory × W_constitution × W_manifesto
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">Where:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>W_theory</strong>: Confidence from first-principles reasoning</li>
<li><strong>W_constitution</strong>: Confidence that all 13 Floors are satisfied</li>
<li><strong>W_manifesto</strong>: Confidence that the action aligns with stated intent</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Consensus requirement</strong>: W³ ≥ 0.95</p>
<p dir="auto">If W³ < 0.95, the action is either:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Blocked</strong> (if any hard Floor fails)</li>
<li><strong>Escalated to human</strong> (if confidence is borderline)</li>
<li><strong>Executed with warnings</strong> (if only soft Floors are marginal)</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Why Three Rings?</h3><a id="user-content-why-three-rings" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Why Three Rings?" href="#why-three-rings"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Single-ring governance fails:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Human-only</strong>: Slow, inconsistent, doesn't scale</li>
<li><strong>Constitution-only</strong>: Rigid, can't adapt to novel situations</li>
<li><strong>Machine-only</strong>: Optimizes for wrong objectives, lacks values</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Three-ring governance with consensus requirement:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Captures human intent (SOUL)</li>
<li>Enforces safety constraints (MIND)</li>
<li>Enables capability (BODY)</li>
<li>Requires agreement before action (W³)</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The Data-Driven Constitutional Core (Horizon II.1)</h2><a id="user-content-the-data-driven-constitutional-core-horizon-ii1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The Data-Driven Constitutional Core (Horizon II.1)" href="#the-data-driven-constitutional-core-horizon-ii1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">As of 2026.04.06, arifOS no longer defines its intelligence tools in executable code.</p>
<p dir="auto">The constitutional registry is now:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="arifosmcp/tool_registry.json"><pre class="notranslate"><code>arifosmcp/tool_registry.json
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">This file is the <strong>Single Source of Constitutional Truth (SSCT)</strong>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Why This Matters</h3><a id="user-content-why-this-matters" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Why This Matters" href="#why-this-matters"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Before</th>
<th>After</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Tools defined in Python</td>
<td>Tools defined in canonical JSON</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Constitution embedded in code</td>
<td>Constitution separable from runtime</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Static registration</td>
<td>Dynamic registry loading</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Implicit trust</td>
<td>Hash-verifiable sovereignty</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Boot-Time Verification</h3><a id="user-content-boot-time-verification" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Boot-Time Verification" href="#boot-time-verification"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">At server startup:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><code>tool_registry.json</code> is parsed</li>
<li>A SHA-256 registry hash is computed</li>
<li>The hash is logged</li>
<li>Any drift without 888_APEX verdict → HOLD</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Constitutional Invariant</h3><a id="user-content-constitutional-invariant" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Constitutional Invariant" href="#constitutional-invariant"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>No tool may exist outside the registry.</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">If a tool is not in <code>tool_registry.json</code>, it does not exist.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">The 000-999 Metabolic Pipeline</h2><a id="user-content-the-000-999-metabolic-pipeline" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: The 000-999 Metabolic Pipeline" href="#the-000-999-metabolic-pipeline"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Stage-by-Stage Breakdown</h3><a id="user-content-stage-by-stage-breakdown" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Stage-by-Stage Breakdown" href="#stage-by-stage-breakdown"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Stage</th>
<th>Band</th>
<th>Function</th>
<th>What Actually Happens</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>000_INIT</strong></td>
<td>Anchor</td>
<td>Session initialization</td>
<td>Validates the request, loads constitutional context, initializes the session if needed. Returns ANCHORED or VOID.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>111_SENSE</strong></td>
<td>Reality</td>
<td>Input parsing, reality grounding</td>
<td>Parses the request, grounds it in observable reality (time, location, available tools), identifies what the user is actually asking for.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>333_MIND</strong></td>
<td>AGI</td>
<td>Reasoning, constitutional filters</td>
<td>Applies the 13 Floors (F1-F13) to the intended action. Computes confidence scores, identifies risks.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>444_ROUT</strong></td>
<td>Router</td>
<td>Tool selection, operation sequencing</td>
<td>Determines which tools to call, in what order, with what parameters. Builds the execution plan.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>555_MEM</strong></td>
<td>Engineer</td>
<td>Memory, context retention</td>
<td>Retrieves relevant past interactions from the vector database (Qdrant), updates context with new information.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>666_HEART</strong></td>
<td>ASI</td>
<td>Safety critique, harm potential</td>
<td>Runs a second-pass safety check focused on emergent harms — things the first pass might have missed.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>777_OPS</strong></td>
<td>Thermo</td>
<td>Estimation, Landauer limits</td>
<td>Estimates computational cost, thermodynamic bounds, resource requirements. Prevents resource exhaustion.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>888_JUDGE</strong></td>
<td>APEX</td>
<td>Final constitutional judgment</td>
<td>Combines all checks into a final verdict: SEAL, COMPLY, CAUTION, HOLD, SABAR, or VOID.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>999_SEAL</strong></td>
<td>Vault</td>
<td>Immutable audit log</td>
<td>Writes the decision, reasoning, and outcome to the append-only vault ledger. Cryptographically signed.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Prompt Features:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Constitutional Guard</strong>: Every prompt includes automatic rejection of floor overrides</li>
<li><strong>Ω₀ Band</strong>: Uncertainty declaration [0.03-0.05] enforced</li>
<li><strong>Machine-Verifiable Outputs</strong>: Required fields validated by <code>validator.py</code></li>
<li><strong>ASF-1 Compatibility</strong>: Dual-layer format support</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto">Validate prompts:</p>
