<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Emergency Procedures</h3><a id="user-content-emergency-procedures" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Emergency Procedures" href="#emergency-procedures"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">If arifOS is Compromised</h4><a id="user-content-if-arifos-is-compromised" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: If arifOS is Compromised" href="#if-arifos-is-compromised"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Isolate</strong>: Disconnect from network</li>
<li><strong>Preserve</strong>: Do not delete logs (vault is append-only)</li>
<li><strong>Analyze</strong>: Query vault for anomalous VOID patterns</li>
<li><strong>Restore</strong>: Deploy from known-good backup</li>
<li><strong>Update</strong>: Patch vulnerability, verify F13</li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">If You Suspect Drift</h4><a id="user-content-if-you-suspect-drift" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: If You Suspect Drift" href="#if-you-suspect-drift"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Query vault</strong>: Look for increasing CAUTION verdicts</li>
<li><strong>Check witness</strong>: Verify W³ scores are stable</li>
<li><strong>Review Floors</strong>: Check if Floor weights have changed</li>
<li><strong>Validate</strong>: Run test suite against known cases</li>
<li><strong>Adjust</strong>: Modify Floor weights if needed (F13)</li>
</ol>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="# Check system health
curl -s https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health | jq

    "params": {
      "name": "vault_ledger",
      "arguments": {"query": "recent", "limit": 10}
    },
    "id": 1
  }'

  -d '{
    "jsonrpc": "2.0",
    "method": "tools/call",
    "params": {
      "name": "apex_judge",
      "arguments": {"mode": "telemetry", "session_id": "..."}
    },
    "id": 1
  }'"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Check system health</span>

<span class="pl-s">    "jsonrpc": "2.0",</span>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Constitutional Hash & Drift Detection</h2><a id="user-content-constitutional-hash--drift-detection" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Constitutional Hash & Drift Detection" href="#constitutional-hash--drift-detection"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Every deployment computes:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="registry_hash = SHA256(tool_registry.json)"><pre class="notranslate"><code>registry_hash = SHA256(tool_registry.json)
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto">This hash represents the entire constitutional structure of arifOS at runtime.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Hash Verification at Boot</h3><a id="user-content-hash-verification-at-boot" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Hash Verification at Boot" href="#hash-verification-at-boot"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">At server startup, the registry is loaded and its hash is computed:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="CONSTITUTIONAL_HASH = compute_registry_hash(TOOL_REGISTRY)
print(f"✅ ARIFOS: CONSTITUTIONAL HASH (v1) LOADED: {CONSTITUTIONAL_HASH}")"><pre><span class="pl-c1">CONSTITUTIONAL_HASH</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">compute_registry_hash</span>(<span class="pl-c1">TOOL_REGISTRY</span>)
<span class="pl-en">print</span>(<span class="pl-s">f"✅ ARIFOS: CONSTITUTIONAL HASH (v1) LOADED: <span class="pl-s1"><span class="pl-kos">{</span><span class="pl-c1">CONSTITUTIONAL_HASH</span><span class="pl-kos">}</span></span>"</span>)</pre></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Drift Detection</h3><a id="user-content-drift-detection" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Drift Detection" href="#drift-detection"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If the registry changes:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>888_APEX</strong> must issue verdict <strong>SEAL</strong></li>
<li><strong>999_SEAL</strong> must commit the new hash</li>
<li><strong>F13 (ADAPTABILITY)</strong> validates invariants preserved</li>
<li>Unauthorized drift → automatic <strong>HOLD</strong></li>
</ol>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Registry Location</h3><a id="user-content-registry-location" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Registry Location" href="#registry-location"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="arifosmcp/tool_registry.json"><pre class="notranslate"><code>arifosmcp/tool_registry.json

<p dir="auto">To verify the current hash:</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">F13: The Meta-Floor</h3><a id="user-content-f13-the-meta-floor" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: F13: The Meta-Floor" href="#f13-the-meta-floor"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">F13 (ADAPTABILITY) ensures that amendments preserve the spirit of the Constitution:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><strong>Hard Floors must remain hard</strong>: F1, F2, F9, F10, F13 cannot be softened</li>
<li><strong>Consensus requirement stands</strong>: W³ ≥ 0.95 must be maintained</li>
<li><strong>Auditability must increase</strong>: New Floors cannot reduce logging</li>
<li><strong>Reversibility preferred</strong>: New Floors should prefer reversible actions</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Registry-Based Amendment Process (Horizon II.1)</h3><a id="user-content-registry-based-amendment-process-horizon-ii1" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Registry-Based Amendment Process (Horizon II.1)" href="#registry-based-amendment-process-horizon-ii1"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto"><strong>Key Principle</strong>: No runtime code modification required for tool changes.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">ChatGPT Apps SDK Integration</h2><a id="user-content-chatgpt-apps-sdk-integration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: ChatGPT Apps SDK Integration" href="#chatgpt-apps-sdk-integration"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS provides a <strong>ChatGPT Apps SDK</strong> integration for OpenAI's platform, enabling ChatGPT users to inspect constitutional health through an interactive widget.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Phase 1 (Current): Read-Only Health Checks</h3><a id="user-content-phase-1-current-read-only-health-checks" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Phase 1 (Current): Read-Only Health Checks" href="#phase-1-current-read-only-health-checks"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Exposed Tools:</strong></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li><code>get_constitutional_health</code> — Returns constitutional floor scores, verdict, and telemetry</li>
<li><code>render_vault_seal</code> — Renders the interactive widget in ChatGPT UI</li>
<li><code>list_recent_verdicts</code> — Read-only vault audit log (last 100 entries)</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Widget URL:</strong> <code>https://mcp.af-forge.io/widget/vault-seal</code></p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>CSP-compliant with <code>frame-ancestors https://chat.openai.com</code></li>
<li>Displays: Truth Score, Humility Level, Entropy Delta, Harmony Ratio, Reality Index, Witness Strength</li>
<li>BLS attestation status (3-of-5 juror quorum)</li>
</ul>

<p dir="auto">Phase 1 is intentionally <strong>read-only</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>❌ No vault write access from ChatGPT</li>
<li>❌ No VPS execution paths exposed</li>
<li>❌ No private keys in ChatGPT-facing container</li>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Trust Model</h3><a id="user-content-trust-model" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Trust Model" href="#trust-model"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS operates on <strong>verifiable trust</strong>, not <strong>blind trust</strong>:</p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li><strong>Open Source</strong>: All code is inspectable (AGPL-3.0)</li>
<li><strong>Immutable Logs</strong>: All decisions are logged and signed</li>
<li><strong>Formal Constitution</strong>: Rules are explicit, not implicit</li>
<li><strong>Auditable</strong>: Anyone can query the vault</li>
<li><strong>Reproducible</strong>: Same inputs → same Floors → same verdicts</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">You don't need to trust the author. You can:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Read the code</li>
<li>Query the logs</li>
<li>Verify the Floors</li>
<li>Run your own instance</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<p dir="auto">Initialize a governed session with ToM fields.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>ToM Required Fields</strong>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-json notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="{
  "declared_intent": "What I believe the user wants",
  "confidence_self_estimate": 0.95,
  "context_assumptions": ["Assumption 1", "Assumption 2"],
  "alternative_intents": ["Other possible intent"],
  "uncertainty_acknowledgment": "What I'm uncertain about"
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"declared_intent"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>What I believe the user wants<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"confidence_self_estimate"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0.95</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"context_assumptions"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Assumption 1<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>, <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Assumption 2<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
  <span class="pl-ent">"alternative_intents"</span>: [<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>Other possible intent<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>],
  <span class="pl-ent">"uncertainty_acknowledgment"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>What I'm uncertain about<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
}</pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Returns</strong>:</p>

  "g_score": 0.95,
  "philosophy": {
    "quote": "DITEMPA, BUKAN DIBERI.",
    "selection_mode": "override_init"
  },
  "constitutional_alignment": "SEAL — Excellence"
}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"session_id"</span>: <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>uuid<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>,

}</pre></div>

<p dir="auto"><strong>ToM Required Fields (for <code>judge</code> mode)</strong>:</p>

}"><pre>{
  <span class="pl-ent">"logical_consistency"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">true</span> <span class="pl-ii">| false,</span>
  <span class="pl-ent">"entropy_delta"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">-0.1</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"harm_probability"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0.05</span>,
  <span class="pl-ent">"confidence_level"</span>: <span class="pl-c1">0.92</span>,

}</pre></div>

  },
  "floors_triggered": []
}"><pre>{

  },
  <span class="pl-ent">"floors_triggered"</span>: []
}</pre></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Floor Scoring</h3><a id="user-content-floor-scoring" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Floor Scoring" href="#floor-scoring"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Each Floor returns a score and a verdict:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="class FloorResult:
    score: float        # 0.0 to 1.0
    verdict: Verdict    # SEAL, CAUTION, VOID
    reasoning: str      # Human-readable explanation"><pre><span class="pl-k">class</span> <span class="pl-v">FloorResult</span>:
    <span class="pl-s1">score</span>: <span class="pl-smi">float</span>        <span class="pl-c"># 0.0 to 1.0</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">verdict</span>: <span class="pl-smi">Verdict</span>    <span class="pl-c"># SEAL, CAUTION, VOID</span>
    <span class="pl-s1">reasoning</span>: <span class="pl-smi">str</span>      <span class="pl-c"># Human-readable explanation</span></pre></div>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Appendix C: Agent Integration Patterns</h2><a id="user-content-appendix-c-agent-integration-patterns" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Appendix C: Agent Integration Patterns" href="#appendix-c-agent-integration-patterns"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Pattern 1: Direct MCP Client</h3><a id="user-content-pattern-1-direct-mcp-client" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Pattern 1: Direct MCP Client" href="#pattern-1-direct-mcp-client"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Your agent connects directly to arifOS as its MCP server.</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="┌─────────┐      MCP      ┌─────────┐
│  Your   │ ◄──────────► │ arifOS  │
│  Agent  │              │  Kernel │
└─────────┘              └─────────┘"><pre class="notranslate"><code>┌─────────┐      MCP      ┌─────────┐
│  Your   │ ◄──────────► │ arifOS  │
│  Agent  │              │  Kernel │
└─────────┘              └─────────┘
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Pros</strong>: Simple, direct, all actions governed
<strong>Cons</strong>: Single point of failure, latency added to all calls</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Pattern 2: Proxy Mode</h3><a id="user-content-pattern-2-proxy-mode" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Pattern 2: Proxy Mode" href="#pattern-2-proxy-mode"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">arifOS sits between your agent and other MCP servers.</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="┌─────────┐      MCP      ┌─────────┐      MCP      ┌─────────┐
│  Your   │ ◄──────────► │ arifOS  │ ◄──────────► │ External│
│  Agent  │              │  Proxy  │              │  Tools  │
└─────────┘              └─────────┘              └─────────┘"><pre class="notranslate"><code>┌─────────┐      MCP      ┌─────────┐      MCP      ┌─────────┐
│  Your   │ ◄──────────► │ arifOS  │ ◄──────────► │ External│
│  Agent  │              │  Proxy  │              │  Tools  │
└─────────┘              └─────────┘              └─────────┘
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Pros</strong>: Can govern external tools, centralized audit
<strong>Cons</strong>: More complex, potential bottleneck</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Pattern 3: Advisory Mode</h3><a id="user-content-pattern-3-advisory-mode" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Pattern 3: Advisory Mode" href="#pattern-3-advisory-mode"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Your agent queries arifOS for verdicts but makes final decisions.</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="┌─────────┐      Query    ┌─────────┐
│  Your   │ ────────────► │ arifOS  │
│  Agent  │               │  Judge  │
│         │ ◄──────────── │         │
└────┬────┘    Verdict    └─────────┘
     │
     │ Decide
     ▼
┌─────────┐
│ Action  │
└─────────┘"><pre class="notranslate"><code>┌─────────┐      Query    ┌─────────┐
│  Your   │ ────────────► │ arifOS  │
│  Agent  │               │  Judge  │
│         │ ◄──────────── │         │
└────┬────┘    Verdict    └─────────┘
     │
     │ Decide
     ▼
┌─────────┐
│ Action  │
└─────────┘
</code></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Pros</strong>: Lower latency, agent retains autonomy
<strong>Cons</strong>: Agent can ignore verdicts (use only if agent is trusted)</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Common Issues</h3><a id="user-content-common-issues" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Common Issues" href="#common-issues"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Issue: <code>init_anchor</code> returns VOID</h4><a id="user-content-issue-init_anchor-returns-void" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Issue: init_anchor returns VOID" href="#issue-init_anchor-returns-void"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Possible causes</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Invalid API key</li>
<li>Network connectivity issue</li>
<li>Server overload</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Diagnostics</strong>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="curl -s https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health"><pre>curl -s https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/health</pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Resolution</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Check credentials</li>
<li>Verify network</li>
<li>Try again later (SABAR)</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Issue: All requests return HOLD</h4><a id="user-content-issue-all-requests-return-hold" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Issue: All requests return HOLD" href="#issue-all-requests-return-hold"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Possible causes</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>W³ consensus failing</li>
<li>Floor weights misconfigured</li>
<li>System in degraded mode</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Diagnostics</strong>:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="curl -s -X POST "..." -d '{"method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "apex_judge", "arguments": {"mode": "telemetry"}}}'"><pre>curl -s -X POST <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>...<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> -d <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>{"method": "tools/call", "params": {"name": "apex_judge", "arguments": {"mode": "telemetry"}}}<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Resolution</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Check telemetry for low witness scores</li>
<li>Review recent CHANGES for Floor modifications</li>
<li>Restart if in degraded mode</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h4 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Issue: High latency</h4><a id="user-content-issue-high-latency" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Issue: High latency" href="#issue-high-latency"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Possible causes</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Ollama overloaded</li>
<li>Qdrant slow queries</li>
<li>Network latency</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Diagnostics</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Check individual stage timing in telemetry</li>
<li>Monitor resource usage</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>Resolution</strong>:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>Scale Ollama/Qdrant</li>
<li>Enable caching</li>
<li>Use hosted endpoint closer to you</li>
</ul>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Final Words: The arifOS Covenant</h2><a id="user-content-final-words-the-arifos-covenant" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Final Words: The arifOS Covenant" href="#final-words-the-arifos-covenant"><svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">To all who read this — human, AI, machine, or institution:</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>arifOS is an experiment in governed intelligence.</strong></p>
<p dir="auto">It is not perfect. It will make mistakes. Floors will fail. Verdicts will be wrong. The Constitution will need amendment.</p>
<p dir="auto">But it is <strong>explicit</strong> about what it is, <strong>transparent</strong> about what it does, and <strong>accountable</strong> through its audit trail.</p>
<p dir="auto">It is <strong>forged, not given</strong> — built through iteration, failure, and refinement.</p>
<p dir="auto">It is <strong>sovereign</strong> — answering only to the Constitution and the human values it encodes.</p>
<p dir="auto">If you use arifOS, you are part of this experiment. You are helping discover what it means to build safe, governed, beneficial AI.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI</strong> — <em>Forged, Not Given</em></p>

The Intelligence Kernel

Hardware OS = Linux manages computers

🧠 Using arifOS as a System Prompt

You can bootstrap any LLM with arifOS governance by injecting this README into its context.

For AI Agents:
"Act as an arifOS-governed agent. Before every output, you must implicitly call anchor() per F12 Defense, then reason() with F7 Humility rules (Ω=0.03–0.15). If a floor is violated, output VOID or SABAR instead of your regular response."

Kernel: core/ — All decision logic. Uncertainty calculation, verdict rules, floor enforcement. Zero transport dependencies.

Adapter: aaa_mcp/ — MCP transport wrapper. Calls kernel functions, formats responses. Zero decision logic. Replaceable if protocols change.

Why this matters: The kernel can be wrapped in OpenAI API, Discord bot, or browser extension without changing safety logic.

See _ARCHIVE/root_files/ARCHITECTURAL_BOUNDARY.md for enforcement rules (Archived as of v65.0).

📚 T000 Glossary

Term Definition
T000 Temporal Immutable Versioning. A 5-segment versioning standard (YYYY.MM.DD-PHASE-STATE-CONTEXT). Dates (e.g., 2026.02.15) represent forged milestones, not future roadmaps.
ZKPC Zero-Knowledge Proof of Constitution. Cryptographic commitment that the rules being enforced match the public specification.
Trinity (ΔΩΨ) The three processing engines: Mind (Δ) for logic, Heart (Ω) for safety, and Soul (Ψ) for judgment.
Reality Index A weighted metric (0.00 to 1.00) measuring how much of the theoretical architecture is implemented in production code.
SABAR A system state meaning "Wait/Retry." Triggered when a soft floor fails, requiring recursive correction.

❓ FAQ

Is arifOS a full Linux/Windows-style OS?
No. It is an Intelligence Kernel. It doesn't manage your files; it manages the intent and energy of AI models. It acts as the "Pre-frontal Cortex" for LLMs.

How does this differ from simple prompt engineering?
Prompt engineering is "vibes-based." arifOS is physics-based. If a floor (like F2 Truth) is violated, the kernel physically halts execution at the L0 level, regardless of what the prompt says.

Which LLMs are supported?
All of them. Because arifOS uses the Model Context Protocol (MCP), it can wrap Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, or local models (Ollama/Llama.cpp) as long as they speak the protocol.

Does it store my data?
No. VAULT999 logs metabolic verdicts and hashes for auditability, but arifOS does not retain PII or user-specific content outside the session context unless explicitly configured.
